scored_papers.title: Gouy phase engineering of self-splitting quantum correlations
scored_papers.abstract: We demonstrate the effect of self-splitting spatial quantum correlations induced by Gouy phase engineering. In SPDC the pump beam is structured with a mode superposition that produces dynamical splitting and recombination of the light beam. This structure is transferred to the quantum correlations between signal and idler photons. The joint two-photon probability distribution propagates like a self-splitting and recombining light beam, implementing a Mach-Zehnder-like interferometer. We observe heralded single-photon interference and two-photon NOON state interference.
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 Gouy phase で構造化した SPDC pump で signal-idler の量子相関が自己分裂・再結合!Mach-Zehnder 風 + heralded + 二光子 NOON 状態干渉を観測
scored_papers.summary: ✨ pump を mode 重ね合わせで構造化 → biphoton joint probability が分裂・再結合で伝搬。heralded single-photon と two-photon NOON 干渉を実験観測
